'''âf-y-m''' ('''fayama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preadapt|preadapt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-y-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preadapt|preadapt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-y-m
|-
! Lemma
| fayama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fayamithi|fayamithi]] || [[word:fayamiji|fayamiji]] || [[word:fayamishi|fayamishi]] || [[word:fayami|fayami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fayamuthuth|fayamuthuth]] || [[word:fayamujuj|fayamujuj]] || [[word:fayamushush|fayamushush]] || [[word:fayam|fayam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fayamuthu|fayamuthu]] || [[word:fayamuju|fayamuju]] || [[word:fayamushu|fayamushu]] || [[word:fayamu|fayamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fayamufuth|fayamufuth]] || [[word:fayamufuj|fayamufuj]] || [[word:fayamufush|fayamufush]] || [[word:fayamuf|fayamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fayamethe|fayamethe]] || [[word:fayameje|fayameje]] || [[word:fayameshe|fayameshe]] || [[word:fayame|fayame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fayamothoth|fayamothoth]] || [[word:fayamojoj|fayamojoj]] || [[word:fayamoshosh|fayamoshosh]] || [[word:fayam|fayam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fayamotho|fayamotho]] || [[word:fayamojo|fayamojo]] || [[word:fayamosho|fayamosho]] || [[word:fayamo|fayamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fayamofoth|fayamofoth]] || [[word:fayamofoj|fayamofoj]] || [[word:fayamofosh|fayamofosh]] || [[word:fayamof|fayamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fayamĂŠthĂŠ|fayamĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fayamĂŠjĂŠ|fayamĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fayamĂŠshĂŠ|fayamĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fayamĂŠ|fayamĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fayamathath|fayamathath]] || [[word:fayamajaj|fayamajaj]] || [[word:fayamashash|fayamashash]] || [[word:fayam|fayam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fayamatha|fayamatha]] || [[word:fayamaja|fayamaja]] || [[word:fayamasha|fayamasha]] || [[word:fayama|fayama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fayamafath|fayamafath]] || [[word:fayamafaj|fayamafaj]] || [[word:fayamafash|fayamafash]] || [[word:fayamaf|fayamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fayamasha|fayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofayamasha|gofayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifayamasha|gokifayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fayamnĂŒsha|fayamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofayamnknĂŒsha|gofayamnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifayamnĂŒsha|gokifayamnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fayamshĂ«sha|fayamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofayamnkshĂ«sha|gofayamnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifayamshĂ«sha|gokifayamshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fayamrosha|fayamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofayamnkrosha|gofayamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifayamrosha|gokifayamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fayamusha|fayamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofayamnkmusha|gofayamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifayamusha|gokifayamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fayamsherasha|fayamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofayamnksherasha|gofayamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifayamsherasha|gokifayamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fayamngasha|fayamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofayamnkngasha|gofayamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifayamngasha|gokifayamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fayamyasha|fayamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofayamnkyasha|gofayamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifayamyasha|gokifayamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fayamyamasha|fayamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofayamnkyamasha|gofayamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifayamyamasha|gokifayamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fayamnĂŒshĂ«sha|fayamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofayamnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gofayamnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifayamnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokifayamnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fayamnĂŒrosha|fayamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofayamnknĂŒrosha|gofayamnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifayamnĂŒrosha|gokifayamnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fayamnĂŒmusha|fayamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofayamnknĂŒmusha|gofayamnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifayamnĂŒmusha|gokifayamnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fayamshĂ«nĂŒsha|fayamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofayamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gofayamnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifayamshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokifayamshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fayamshĂ«rosha|fayamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofayamnkshĂ«rosha|gofayamnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifayamshĂ«rosha|gokifayamshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fayamshĂ«musha|fayamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofayamnkshĂ«musha|gofayamnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifayamshĂ«musha|gokifayamshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fayamronĂŒsha|fayamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofayamnkronĂŒsha|gofayamnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifayamronĂŒsha|gokifayamronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fayamroshĂ«sha|fayamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofayamnkroshĂ«sha|gofayamnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifayamroshĂ«sha|gokifayamroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fayamromusha|fayamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofayamnkromusha|gofayamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifayamromusha|gokifayamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fayamunĂŒsha|fayamunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofayamnkmunĂŒsha|gofayamnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifayamunĂŒsha|gokifayamunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fayamushĂ«sha|fayamushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofayamnkmushĂ«sha|gofayamnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifayamushĂ«sha|gokifayamushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fayamurosha|fayamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofayamnkmurosha|gofayamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifayamurosha|gokifayamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fayam|fayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:fĂŠyĂŠm|fĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofayam|hofayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hofĂŠyĂŠm|hofĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofayam|hohofayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofĂŠyĂŠm|hohofĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒfayam|nĂŒfayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒfĂŠyĂŠm|nĂŒfĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfayam|nĂŒnĂŒfayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠyĂŠm|nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻfayam|nĂŻfayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻfĂŠyĂŠm|nĂŻfĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfayam|nĂŻnĂŻfayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠyĂŠm|nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufayam|lufayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lufĂŠyĂŠm|lufĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufayam|lulufayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufĂŠyĂŠm|lulufĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifayam|lifayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lifĂŠyĂŠm|lifĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifayam|lilifayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifĂŠyĂŠm|lilifĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofayam|kofayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kofĂŠyĂŠm|kofĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofayam|kokofayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofĂŠyĂŠm|kokofĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefayam|kefayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kefĂŠyĂŠm|kefĂŠyĂŠm]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefayam|kekefayam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefĂŠyĂŠm|kekefĂŠyĂŠm]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
